overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic streets of Saint Denis at night during light rain. The scene features wet cobblestone streets reflecting warm gas lamp light, historic architecture with wrought iron balconies, and a moody atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic district street adjacent to fenced park

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone sidewalk past iron fences and park benches

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence with stone pillars marking the park boundary
wooden slatted bench positioned along the sidewalk
tall tree with hanging branches extending over the fence
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light
three-story stone building with arched windows and wrought iron balconies

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cobblestone street at night, passing a black iron fence and park benches on the left. A large willow tree hangs over the fence while warm gas lamps illuminate the historic stone buildings ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with restaurant signage

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing down the cobblestone street as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street from right to left, passing the character

entered.detail: large illuminated red neon sign reading 'JADE DRAGON RESTAURANT' mounted above the street
hanging red paper lanterns decorating the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper into the historic district as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right. The illuminated red 'Jade Dragon Restaurant' sign becomes visible in the distance, hanging above the cobblestone street lined with gas lamps.

events.description: passing directly beneath the illuminated Jade Dragon Restaurant sign overhead

agents.ego_description: walking under the glowing red neon sign and continuing down the narrow street

entered.detail: covered market structure with green awnings visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the glowing red Jade Dragon Restaurant sign, which dominates the narrow street overhead. The street opens slightly ahead to reveal a covered market structure with green awnings in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with tram station

events.description: entering the open market area with tram streetcar becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: approaching the open market square where a tram streetcar is stationed

entered.detail: vintage electric tram with illuminated windows stationed at the market

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open market square, leaving the narrow street behind. A vintage tram streetcar sits stationed ahead under the market canopy, while the rain continues to fall on the cobblestones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked historic district that transitions from a quiet, lamp-lit street into a bustling open market square. It begins by following a character past a black iron fence and a drooping willow tree, where warm gas lamps cast a glow over wet cobblestones and stone buildings. As the character moves deeper into the district, a horse-drawn carriage passes by, and the scene shifts toward the distant, glowing red sign of the Jade Dragon Restaurant. The camera then passes directly beneath the dominant red neon light of the restaurant before the narrow street opens up to reveal a covered market structure with green awnings. Finally, the movement emerges from the confined alleyway into a wide open square where a vintage tram streetcar sits stationed under the canopy in the falling rain.
